pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer snapshot release.

src/main/java/maven/Brute.java.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for modern Java API usage.
Update import statement to use Path instead of Paths to match the new API call.
Replace Runtime.exec(String) with Runtime.exec(String[]) to avoid ambiguity and potential issues with command parsing.

src/main/java/maven/DB.java.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for SQL query construction.
src/main/java/maven/DB.java.before: String.format("select CONTRACT_DEFINATION_UID from contract_defination where APPLICATION_NUMBER_ALIAS = '%s' order by issue_date desc", oaNo)
src/main/java/maven/DB.java.after: "select CONTRACT_DEFINATION_UID from contract_defination where APPLICATION_NUMBER_ALIAS = '%s' order by issue_date desc".formatted(oaNo)

src/main/java/maven/DB.java.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for SQL update statement construction.
src/main/java/maven/DB.java.before: String.format("update distribution_outage set CONTRACT_DEFINATION_UID = %d where oa_number = '%s'", cdID, oaNo)
src/main/java/maven/DB.java.after: "update distribution_outage set CONTRACT_DEFINATION_UID = %d where oa_number = '%s'".formatted(cdID, oaNo)

src/main/java/maven/Downloader.java.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for string interpolation.
Replace deprecated URL constructor with URI.create().toURL() to avoid unchecked exception handling.

src/main/java/maven/Loader.java.general_idea: Add import for java.net.URI to support the new URL creation method.

src/main/java/maven/REST.java.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for modern Java API usage.
